metadata.description: Marketplace for AI goodies created by Yemi

plugins.name: teams-notifier
plugins.description: Sends completion notifications to Microsoft Teams when tasks are finished

plugins.name: teams-plan-tracker
plugins.description: Automatically posts plans to Teams and threads PR updates as replies. Tracks plan IDs and manages the workflow between plan creation, PR creation, and completion tracking.

plugins.name: prism
plugins.description: Track stacked PR dependencies and completion status with a live dashboard. Auto-updates when PRs are created.

plugins.name: http-toolkit
plugins.description: HTTPS-intercepting proxy MCP server for capturing and inspecting network traffic from mobile apps, browsers, and other HTTP clients

plugins.name: loop-page-viewer
plugins.description: MCP app that renders Loop pages inline in chat with view and edit capabilities
